meaning: n.滑倒,事故,片,纸片;vi.滑动,滑倒,失足,减退;vt.使滑动,滑过,摆脱,闪开,塞入;adj.滑动的,活络的,有活结的;Serial Line Interface Protocol,串行线路接口协议
examples: She allowed victory to slip from her grasp.
I put her name on the slip.
Result: Plausible risks tend to slip by us while more remote eventualities get all the attention.
After Jeremy Bray's stumps were splattered, solitary slip Yusuf Pathan collected two excellent catches.
